creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
The SNU sh utilities, including basename, chroot, date,
	dirname, echo, env, expr, false, groups, hostid, hostname,
	id, logname, nice, nohup, pathchk, pinky, printenv, printf,
	pwd, sleep, stty, su, tee, test, true, tty, uname, users,
	who, whoami, and yes.

How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
